title: Spooky Additions
description: Adds a collection of small spooky themed structures to your world
body:
This mod adds a collection of small spooky themed structures to your world.

They are simple and designed to add a creepy atmosphere to your Minecraft adventures.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8491ae9f6963b32fb84d32577be3ec72b7e56adc.jpeg)

You can find creepy pumpkins, haunted tombs, devil villager statues, dark ritual sites, giant skeleton hands, mysterious pumpkin cart and more!

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a78f0c3c9d97b6a68d07b57a1fb152bc0748f0ac.jpeg)

Perfect for players who want to bring a darker, mysterious tone to their world, without changing the gameplay too much.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
